Watch for next poll: (1) 8 April-EOM closures resolve at 2026-04-30 23:59Z (~12.9h from now); first post-closure poll likely evening 2026-04-30 (~23:00Z) — watch for quiet pass-mark vs silent-ignore-in-progress vs goalpost-move on predictions.html. (2) PRED-105 enters d=13+ at next poll; analyst tacit_withdrawal threshold d=14 hits at 2026-05-02. (3) PRED-105 test_window string in our predictions.json should be tightened to '2026-04-18 (14-day window)' so Step 10b stops returning false-positive imminent on EOM. (4) 10th daily-AI-review regen due ~07:35Z 2026-05-01; HOLD #10 if registry counts unchanged, ABSORB triggers CRITICAL. (5) Any source-file touch → CRITICAL. (6) Sq-subtraction methodology document (per analyst's 04-27T07:12 EXP-267 guidance) — classify likely-responsive per author-contact prior; if OTS-anchored before measurement, that is the canary fix. (7) Any new OTS file referencing predictions-only (not status_history.json) → CANARY TRIGGERED, escalate immediately. (8) Manual-commit drought breaches 13d at next poll (currently 12.96d); 24 consecutive auto-only polls if no manual lands. OTHER SIDE OF ARGUMENT: The 23-poll auto-only streak + 12.96d drought + HOLD-#9 daily-review-regen pattern is consistent with two readings — (a) author has stepped back from active site curation pre-EOM-closures (counter: auto-pipeline still healthy, 9 commits in this 11.94h window, daily-review on schedule); (b) author is queuing post-closure rewrites for tonight or tomorrow morning, hence the manual silence (counter: zero non-main-branch activity, no preparatory file changes, no draft commits visible via API). The HOLD streak extending one more cycle without any registry-count drift is itself informative — the dome is staying in 'do not adjudicate' mode through the imminent April-EOM closure batch. Conservative substantive/MEDIUM cadence-rollup classification preserves attention without over-reacting to a behavioral pattern that could simply reflect the author waiting for the closure batch before touching the page. PRESERVATION NOTE: this poll preserves analyst/decider/curmudgeon last_run + note + prev_agent_run + notes_this_run + patches_applied_this_run + issues_*_this_run + open_issues + closed_issues + curmudgeon_* + pat_note_resolved_by_operator + last_decider_* + last_analyst_* intact, only updating poll-owned fields.
